texto: Not just Christians and Jews, but also Muslims, Buddhists, Hindus and the followers of many other religions believe in values like peace, respect, tolerance and dignity. These are values that bring people together and enable us to build responsible and solid communities.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Alcee Hastings: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a fe. O trecho “Not just Christians and Jews, but also Muslims, Buddhists, Hindus and the followers of many other…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, paz, together pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de together e believe.

frase_original: Not just Christians and Jews, but also Muslims, Buddhists, Hindus and the followers of many other religions believe in values like peace, respect, tolerance and dignity. These are values that bring people together and enable us to build responsible and solid communities.

texto: Yesterday in this country we had people die of hunger and malnutrition. In some parts of this country, the infant mortality rate rivals that of sub-Saharan Africa. We have a public education system that ranks below that of almost any other Western nation.
